title: OrderTest Manifest
description: External manifest file for @playwright-ordertest/core defining ordered test sequences.

sequences.description: Ordered list of test sequences. Each sequence defines a group of files to run in a specific order and mode.

SequenceDefinition.description: A named, ordered group of test files with a specific execution mode.

name.description: Unique identifier for this sequence. Used in project names and log output.

files.description: Ordered list of test files. Each entry is either a file path string or a FileSpecification object.

workers.description: Number of workers to use for this sequence. Ignored in serial mode (always 1).

retries.description: Number of retries for failed tests in this sequence.

timeout.description: Test timeout in milliseconds for all tests in this sequence.

tags.description: Tag filters applied to all files in this sequence. Tests must match at least one tag.

browser.description: Playwright browser project name to use for this sequence.

FileSpecification.description: A test file entry. Either a plain file path string or an object with optional per-file test filtering.

oneOf.description: File specification object with optional test name and tag filters.

file.description: Path to the test file, relative to testDir.

tests.description: Specific test names to run within this file. If omitted, all tests in the file run.

tags.description: Tag filters for this specific file. Overrides sequence-level tags for this file.
